report_name: Final strict validation of FLAIRLAB Knowledge Base Revised V4

findings.reason: The V3 validation contract requires the event_story limits and guidance to use the exact internally consistent 60-to-90-word configuration. The workbook still contains the earlier minimum of 100 words and omits both the maximum and guidance.
findings.recommended_correction: Set min_words to 60, max_words to 90, and guidance_de to "Etwa 60 bis 90 Wörter."

findings.expected: Optional transcription that successfully skips for manual-text-only sessions
findings.reason: The previously reported transcription blocker is corrected exactly.

findings.expected: Optional image metadata generation when images exist
findings.reason: The previously reported image-metadata blocker is corrected exactly.

findings.expected: Optional image caption shown only when images exist
findings.reason: The image-caption blueprint contract is corrected exactly.

findings.expected: Optional gallery marker shown only when images exist
findings.reason: The gallery blueprint contract is corrected exactly.

findings.current_value: event
findings.expected: Unique enabled, template-ready and generation-enabled post type with complete WordPress routing
findings.reason: The enabled event post type has valid typed booleans and complete routing fields.

findings.current_value: Event post template URL
findings.expected: User-reference metadata excluded from runtime validation
findings.reason: The value is not used for routing, activation, startup validation, template lookup or WordPress API selection.

findings.current_value: Five unique enabled examples, all assigned to event
findings.expected: Unique IDs and valid post-type references
findings.reason: All enabled examples, including example 5, resolve to a known post type and use typed enabled/approved booleans.

findings.expected: No redundant post_type column
findings.reason: post_type_key is the sole authoritative post-type reference.

findings.expected: Configured status excluded from the AI schema with a resolved enum domain
findings.reason: The status contract resolves exactly through validation_lists.publish_status.

findings.expected: Required ACF payload field with deterministic empty-result semantics
findings.reason: An empty value is allowed only when deterministic filtering leaves no eligible links.

findings.current_value: Twelve unique enabled shared fields
findings.expected: Unique keys with valid destinations, stages, source modes, value types and limit columns
findings.reason: All enabled shared-field contracts and enum references resolve exactly; configured fields are excluded from AI schemas.

findings.expected: Direct ACF hero_h1 payload field
findings.reason: hero_h1 matches the approved direct-ACF contract.

findings.expected: Direct ACF verlauf_h2 payload field
findings.reason: verlauf_h2 matches the required direct-ACF contract.

findings.current_value: All 48 enabled rows satisfy their role contracts
findings.expected: Valid input_fact, direct_acf, aggregation_source, derived_field and generated_field relationships
findings.reason: Input facts have no direct destinations, direct ACF rows have destinations, and aggregation rows have explicit grouping, order and transforms.

findings.current_value: All declared source_fact_keys resolve to enabled event input facts
findings.expected: Exact same-post-type input-fact dependencies
findings.reason: Required derived rows have explicit dependencies; optional derived rows may remain dependency-free and skippable.

findings.current_value: All 14 enabled blueprint targets resolve exactly
findings.expected: Exact declared-namespace resolution without fuzzy fallback
findings.reason: ACF fields, aggregation groups, sections, shared fields, image metadata and the layout marker all resolve in their declared namespaces.

findings.current_value: All enabled values resolve through validation_lists.display_condition
findings.expected: Controlled display conditions
findings.reason: The image rows use image_count_gt_0 and all other rows use always.

findings.current_value: All 19 workflow conditions resolve
findings.expected: Controlled run conditions with compatible required flags
findings.reason: Every conditional step is optional, and the workbook defines false conditions as successful skips.

findings.current_value: Keine Bilder führt zu erfolgreichem Skip der Bildschritte und blendet Bildabschnitte aus; kein eval().
findings.expected: Typed condition handlers with no unrestricted eval()
findings.reason: The workbook explicitly requires registered typed condition handlers and prohibits eval().

findings.expected: Exact ACF field-key reference
findings.reason: style_001 correctly resolves hero_intro as a field rather than a section.

findings.current_value: All 14 enabled style targets resolve
findings.expected: Exact fields, sections, context tags and content signals
findings.reason: No fuzzy or fallback style matching is required.

findings.current_value: All 25 enabled SEO targets resolve
findings.expected: Exact field, group, section, image metadata, internal-link and draft-validator targets
findings.reason: Every enabled SEO rule resolves in its declared namespace.

findings.current_value: All six enabled story patterns resolve
findings.expected: Known context tags, input facts and content signals
findings.reason: All story-pattern references resolve exactly to controlled lists or enabled input facts.

findings.expected: cover in validation_lists.crop_mode
findings.reason: The Pillow enum value resolves exactly through its declared domain.

findings.current_value: Twenty unique Pillow rules with typed values and valid numeric ranges
findings.expected: Unique, typed and range-valid image-processing configuration
findings.reason: No enabled Pillow rule has an invalid type, range or enum domain.

findings.current_value: image_rules_pillow
findings.expected: Single source of image-processing parameter values
findings.reason: Other image-related sheets define analysis outputs, metadata or routing only; no duplicate Pillow parameter configuration was found.

findings.current_value: All 15 enabled image-analysis outputs resolve
findings.expected: Controlled output types and domains
findings.reason: Expected output types resolve through image_analysis_output, and enum-like outputs have valid domains.

findings.current_value: Eight active, unique, non-TBD URLs
findings.expected: One active row per valid URL
findings.reason: No duplicate active URL or active TBD target exists.

findings.current_value: active=TRUE AND target_url!=TBD AND (post_type_key=* OR post_type_key={post_type_key}) AND canonical_path(target_url)!={current_path}
findings.expected: Deterministic active, non-TBD and canonical self-link filtering
findings.reason: The current path is derived from target_url before semantic ranking.

findings.current_value: Keine URL erfinden. Nur die bereitgestellten Linkkandidaten verwenden.
findings.expected: The model cannot generate URLs
findings.reason: The model may rank known candidates but cannot invent a URL.

findings.current_value: required_facts; source_fact_keys
findings.expected: Python identifies missing dependencies and the model only formulates bundled questions
findings.reason: Required dependencies lead to needs_input; optional dependencies are skipped without questions; confirmed user corrections take precedence.
